title: Campus
description: A CUNY college or school — one of the ~25 institutions in the federated City University of New York system (senior colleges, community colleges, graduate/professional schools, and the Macaulay Honors College). Canonical schema reconciling the college directory on cuny.edu/about/colleges-schools and the institution (business unit) records in CUNYfirst. There is no Open Data twin; this reference data lives only in HTML on cuny.edu and inside the PeopleSoft SIS.

totalEnrollment.description: Total headcount enrollment (from OIRA data book, latest term).
